name: local-copy-blocks
title: Local Copy Blocks
description: Find local Markdown-backed text blocks and copy them for reuse.
author: uchimanajet7

commands.name: block-set-1
commands.title: Block Set 1
commands.description: Browse Markdown-backed text blocks from Block Set 1.

commands.name: block-set-2
commands.title: Block Set 2
commands.description: Browse Markdown-backed text blocks from Block Set 2.

commands.name: block-set-3
commands.title: Block Set 3
commands.description: Browse Markdown-backed text blocks from Block Set 3.

commands.name: all-block-sets
commands.title: All Block Sets
commands.description: Search Markdown-backed text blocks across all enabled Block Sets.

preferences.name: folder1Enabled
preferences.title: Block Set 1
preferences.label: Enable Block Set 1
preferences.description: Include Block Set 1 in its command and All Block Sets.

preferences.name: folder1Directory
preferences.title: Block Set 1 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Block Set 1 reads Markdown-backed text blocks from.

preferences.name: folder1DisplayName
preferences.title: Block Set 1 Name
preferences.description: Display name for Block Set 1. The folder name is used when this is empty.

preferences.name: folder2Enabled
preferences.title: Block Set 2
preferences.label: Enable Block Set 2
preferences.description: Include Block Set 2 in its command and All Block Sets.

preferences.name: folder2Directory
preferences.title: Block Set 2 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Block Set 2 reads Markdown-backed text blocks from.

preferences.name: folder2DisplayName
preferences.title: Block Set 2 Name
preferences.description: Display name for Block Set 2. The folder name is used when this is empty.

preferences.name: folder3Enabled
preferences.title: Block Set 3
preferences.label: Enable Block Set 3
preferences.description: Include Block Set 3 in its command and All Block Sets.

preferences.name: folder3Directory
preferences.title: Block Set 3 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Block Set 3 reads Markdown-backed text blocks from.

preferences.name: folder3DisplayName
preferences.title: Block Set 3 Name
preferences.description: Display name for Block Set 3. The folder name is used when this is empty.

preferences.name: editor
preferences.title: Editor
preferences.description: Editor used to open Markdown-backed text block files.

preferences.name: previewLineCount
preferences.title: Preview Line Count
preferences.description: Number of leading lines to show in the preview.

preferences.name: previewMaxCharacters
preferences.title: Preview Max Characters
preferences.description: Maximum number of characters to show in the preview.

scripts.check: npm run check:type && npm run lint:local && npm run check:local
scripts.lint:local: npm run check:lint && npm run check:format
